title: Microwave Exfoliation of Intercalated Graphite
description: About halfway through i cracked the glass. Boy did it make me jump. Next time i think i will do 10 seconds then 10 seconds rather than 20 all at once. Still the exfoliation volume was truely astounding. In the first experiment i put a tespoon of the intercalated graphite in a jam jar and it filled the jar!
